title: PORTLAND HOUSING CENTER - 211info
text: PORTLAND HOUSING CENTER PORTLAND HOUSING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Resource center for homebuyers, providing pre-purchase counseling, homeownership education, individual development accounts, down payment assistance, and financing. Does not provide any type of rental assistance or construction assistance. Mortgage Assistance Program provides down payment assistance and financing. Does not help with reverse mortgages or individuals experiencing or at risk of foreclosure. 3233 NE Sandy Boulevard Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted for HomeOwner Basics program. Must be at or below 80%-100% Median Family Income (MFI) for mortgage assistance and down payment assistance. Hours: By appointment only. Evening and weekend appointments and classes available. Email (503) 282-7744 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 282-7744 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or register online FEES: $99 fee includes all services, materials, and a SoftTouch credit report DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, and interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Columbia, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on TriMet bus line 12 Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling Individual Development Accounts If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND HOUSING CENTER
